claim_boundary: This contract locks the edge-of-chaos native mechanism transfer protocol without implementing C code or executing hardware. Not hardware evidence. Not a baseline freeze.

contract.claim_boundary: This contract locks the edge-of-chaos native mechanism transfer protocol without implementing C code or executing hardware. Not hardware evidence. Not a baseline freeze.
contract.hypothesis: Yes. The mechanism uses only multiply-add, tanh, and EMA updates — all expressible in s16.15 with existing FP_MUL/FP_TANH primitives in the C runtime. The antisymmetric component is precomputed and static, requiring no online learning.
contract.null_hypothesis: Fixed-point rounding, DTCM budget constraints, or timing overruns prevent faithful reproduction of the software mechanism on hardware.
contract.question: Can the v2.6 edge-of-chaos recurrent dynamics mechanism be migrated to the SpiNNaker custom C runtime with s16.15 fixed-point arithmetic while preserving the mechanism's stated benefits (PR restoration, sham separation)?

criteria.name: compute budget assessed
criteria.value: O(n^2 + n * input_dim) ~ 18k multiply-adds per tick at n=128

criteria.name: resource risk documented (w_rec 64KB)
criteria.value: w_rec at 64KB is near DTCM limit; consider n=64 for first smoke (16KB w_rec)

failure_classes.repair: Reduce hidden units, move w_rec to DTCM, use int16 packing
failure_classes.symptom: .aplx link fails with RO_DATA will not fit

failure_classes.repair: Reduce hidden units from 128 to 64 for first smoke
Clamp antisymmetric component, verify tanh input range
Audit FP_MUL rounding, verify EMA trace update order
failure_classes.symptom: Compact readback differs from float reference

failure_classes.repair: Reduce hidden units, profile matmul, consider sparse antisym

compute_per_tick.antisym_contribution: precomputed static matrix, O(n^2) multiply-adds per tick
compute_per_tick.recurrent_step: 128 x 128 matmul + 128 x input_dim matmul + 128 tanh calls
compute_per_tick.total_ops: O(n^2 + n * input_dim) ~ 18k multiply-adds per tick at n=128

resource_assessment.fits_itcm: w_in fits ITCM; w_rec requires DTCM (64KB)
resource_assessment.risk: w_rec at 64KB is near DTCM limit; consider n=64 for first smoke (16KB w_rec)

migration_stages.description: Lock transfer contract. Define mechanism, state budget, fixed-point constraints, failure classes. No implementation.
Fixed-point local reference: verify edge-of-chaos with s16.15 arithmetic produces same PR and MSE as float reference within tolerance.
C runtime source audit: verify new opcodes, state layout, READ_STATE fields, profile ownership, and host tests pass.
Prepare EBRAINS package: build .aplx with EOC profile, source-only upload, verify binary size fits ITCM/DTCM.
Single-core hardware smoke: build/load/readback on one SpiNNaker board, verify compact state matches fixed-point reference.
Three-seed repeatability: Mackey-Glass/Lorenz at 8000 steps, seeds 42/43/44, 3 boards.

tier: Tier 4.33 - Edge-of-Chaos Native Mechanism Transfer Contract
